lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat jaa aap karaae |
lines.english: When the Lord inspires one to become Gurmukh, and perform devotional worship,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਇਸੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਨਚਾਏ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਪਟੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu is maneh nachaae antar kapatt dukh paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The love of Maya makes this mind dance, and the deceit within makes people suffer in pain. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan man raataa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: then his body and mind are attuned to His Love with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਵਜੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਜਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: baanee vajai sabad vajaae guramukh bhagat thaae paavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The Word of His Bani vibrates, and the Word of His Shabad resounds, for the Gurmukh whose devotional worship is accepted. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਸੁਣੇ ਨ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko sune na man vasaae |
lines.english: but no one will listen, and no one will enshrine it in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਤਾਲ ਪੂਰੇ ਵਾਜੇ ਵਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bahu taal poore vaaje vajaae |
lines.english: One may beat upon and play all sorts of instruments,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਪਿੜ ਬੰਧਿ ਨਾਚੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: maaeaa kaaran pirr bandh naachai doojai bhaae dukh paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: For the sake of Maya, they set the stage and dance, but they are in love with duality, and they obtain only sorrow. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਵਸਿ ਸਚ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਜੁਗਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: eindree vas sach sanjam jugataa |
lines.english: They control their sexual desires, and their lifestyle is the self-discipline of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੈ ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis antar preet lagai so mukataa |
lines.english: Those whose inner beings are attached to the Lord's Love are liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat jug chaare hoee |
lines.english: To live as Gurmukh is devotional worship, throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਏ ਏਹਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sadaa har dhiaae ehaa bhagat har bhaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they meditate forever on the Lord. This devotional worship is pleasing to the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੦॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam gur bhagatee paaeeai gur charanee chit laavaniaa |8|20|21|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is obtained only through devotion to the Guru. So focus your consciousness on the Guru's Feet. ||8||20||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਤੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: horat bhagat na paae koee |
lines.english: This devotional worship is not obtained by any other means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਬ ਹੀ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sachai naae dukh kab hee naahee |
lines.english: With the True Name, pain shall never afflict you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sukhadaataa sevan sukh paaein guramat man vasaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Those who serve the Giver of peace find peace. They enshrine the Guru's Teachings within their minds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸੇਵੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sevee sach saalaahee |
lines.english: Serve the True One, and praise the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree sukh sehaj samaadh lagaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who intuitively enter into the peace of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਗਤੁ ਕਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko teraa bhagat kahaae |
lines.english: All call themselves Your devotees,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo har seveh se sadaa soheh sobhaa surat suhaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who serve the Lord are always beautiful. The glory of their intuitive awareness is beautiful. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਤੁਧੈ ਸਾਲਾਹਨਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sach baanee tudhai saalaahan rang raate bhagat karaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Through the True Word of Your Bani, they praise You; attuned to Your Love, they worship You with devotion. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਭਗਤ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: seee bhagat terai man bhaae |
lines.english: but they alone are Your devotees, who are pleasing to Your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਸਚੇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko sache har jeeo teraa |
lines.english: All are Yours, O Dear True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਚੂਕੈ ਫੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh milai taa chookai feraa |
lines.english: Meeting the Gurmukh, this cycle of reincarnation comes to an end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਨਾਇ ਰਚਾਵਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਨਾਉ ਜਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai taa naae rachaaveh toon aape naau japaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: When it pleases Your Will, then we merge in the Name. You Yourself inspire us to chant the Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee har man vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I enshrine the Lord within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: eikas siau liv laagee sad hee har naam man vasaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: I am lovingly centered on the One Lord forever. I enshrine the Lord's Name within my mind. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਸਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog sabh mohu gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Pleasure and pain, and all emotional attachments are gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: nau nidh naam vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: The nine treasures of the Naam come to dwell within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਤੇਰੈ ਚਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat rang raate sadaa terai chaae |
lines.english: Your devotees are attuned to Your Love; they are always joyful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਬਦੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag satigur paaeaa sabade mel milaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: By perfect destiny, they find the True Guru, and through the Word of the Shabad, they are united in the Lord's Union. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon deaal sadaa sukhadaataa |
lines.english: You are Merciful, and always the Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape melihi guramukh jaataa |
lines.english: You Yourself unite us; You are known only to the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: toon aape deveh naam vaddaaee naam rate sukh paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: You Yourself bestow the glorious greatness of the Naam; attuned to the Naam, we find peace. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਏ ਮਨਿ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਮਨਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: ekas siau man rahiaa samaae man maniai maneh milaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: My mind remains immersed in the One Lord; my mind surrenders to Him, and in my mind I meet Him. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaataa doojaa ko naahee |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I know no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਚੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa saache tudh saalaahee |
lines.english: Forever and ever, O True Lord, I praise You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so saalaahe |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, praises the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: saache tthaakur veparavaahe |
lines.english: Our True Lord and Master is Carefree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੧॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai man antar gurasabadee har melaavaniaa |8|21|22|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within the mind; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we merge with the Lord. ||8||21||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਭਗਤ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tere bhagat soheh saachai darabaare |
lines.english: Your devotees look beautiful in the True Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad naam savaare |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are adorned with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand raheh din raatee gun keh gunee samaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: They are forever in bliss, day and night; chanting the Glorious Praises of the Lord, they merge with the Lord of Glory. ||1||
